name: chutes-ai
description: Access decentralized open-source AI inference via Chutes.ai (all hosted models are TEE confidential-compute). Register accounts, manage API keys, discover models, make OpenAI-compatible inference calls with Bearer cpk_ auth, set up routing with stable aliases, add Sign in with Chutes to your app, deploy vLLM/diffusion chutes, manage quotas and billing, audit OAuth apps, verify TEE attestation, register autonomous agent accounts, and expose Chutes to any agent via MCP.
betaFeatures: chutes-mcp-portability:chutes_teeify (deprecated in place — endpoint removed upstream)
chutes-tee:verified-verdict-pipeline (DCAP wiring spec-only; shape-valid is the ceiling)
